title: taraxacum uncidentatum
intro: Taraxacum uncidentatum, also known as the lesser dandelion or dwarf dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects due to its high content of taraxasterol and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum uncidentatum include its potential to support liver and kidney function, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
